problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: If Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.
